metadata.title: Check your inbox | Slashie
metadata.description: Open the Slashie verification email or request a new verification link.

en.title: Check your inbox
en.descriptionPrefix: We sent a verification link to
en.descriptionSuffix: Open the link to verify your account - you can keep browsing while you wait.
en.loginPrompt: Log in to resend the verification email.

metadata.title: 查看收件箱 | Slashie
metadata.description: 開啟 Slashie 驗證電郵，或重新索取驗證連結。

zh_hk.title: 查看你的收件箱
zh_hk.descriptionPrefix: 我們已傳送驗證連結至
zh_hk.descriptionSuffix: 開啟連結即可驗證帳戶；等候期間你仍可繼續瀏覽。
zh_hk.loginPrompt: 登入以重新傳送驗證電郵。
